title: TLS, Virtual Hosts, Credentials, and Authorization · Execution Trace: Secret Loading Rotation
summary: A Go 1.26 service team must verify server identity, roots, client credentials, vhost permissions, rotation, redaction, and tenant abuse boundaries; reviewers reject hidden goroutine ownership, unbounded work, stale channel state, and claims that stop at a nil client error. The learner predicts values, ownership transitions, and stop paths before seeing a model.
